# Command-skills — reference

Generated from `commands/*.md` frontmatter.

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/help` | Show comprehensive S.A.G.E. help — available skills, MCP tools, CLI commands, hooks, and architecture. |
| `/init` | Set up S.A.G.E. — install the package, initialize a nook, configure MCP server, and verify everything works. |
| `/mine` | Mine projects and conversations into the S.A.G.E.. Supports project files, conversation exports, and auto-classification. |
| `/search` | Search your memories across the S.A.G.E. using semantic search with wing/room/agent filtering. |
| `/status` | Show the current state of your S.A.G.E. — wings, rooms, drawer counts, and suggestions. |
